title: Testro's Minecraft Overhaul
description: Just my preferences on what an overhauled version of Minecraft looks like.
body:
This is my own project that I use with my friends. Includes many Survival Overhaul mods and content mods. Nothing too Un-Vanilla but still adds some cool stuff. 

Has probabaly the best mod to date: Distant Horizons

Also includes World Gen mods like Terralith and Tectonic.
Survival mods like enviroment Z and Dehydration.
Overhaul mods like First-Person Camera and Camera Overhaul.
Decoration mods, Mob and Boss Overhaul mods, More weapons and Armor, Farmer's Delight, and the Create Mod!

And so many more, around 270 mods in all.

Also contains a few resource and shader packs (Bliss and Complementary) to up the quality of the game.

Credits n Stuff for non-modrinth files:

Bliss: Downloaded from the Iris Discord Server (Link to Server: [https://discord.com/servers/the-iris-project-774352792659820594](https://discord.com/servers/the-iris-project-774352792659820594) )

SuperBetterGrass: Downloaded from Curseforge ( [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass) )

Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack: Downloaded from the VT Website ( [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/) )
